title: Pre-stated predictions: manipulability of the 2026 FIFA World Cup group finale
description: Frozen, prospective predictions and analysis code for a study of strategic manipulability in the 48-team 2026 FIFA World Cup group stage. Conditioned on all 24 Matchday-1 results with Matchday 2 and Matchday 3 unplayed, this archives the named Matchday-3 matches the model flags as manipulable (the robust set), the locked scoring rule, and the simulation/theory code. The archive timestamps these predictions before the outcomes they predict. See PREREGISTRATION.md for the full protocol and RESULTS.md (R11) for the registered prediction set.
